---
applyTo: ".github/workflows/**"
---

# Workflow Instructions

Rules for GitHub Actions workflow files in this repository.

<!-- TODO (template users): Update these rules to match your CI/CD conventions.
     Remove rules that don't apply, add ones specific to your project. -->

## SHA Pinning (ADR 004)

- **All third-party actions MUST be pinned to full 40-character commit SHAs**, not tags.
- Include a version comment after the SHA: `uses: actions/checkout@abc123... # v4.2.0`
- When updating a SHA, verify the commit exists on the upstream repo's releases page before committing. A wrong or truncated SHA silently breaks the workflow.
- Dependabot updates SHAs automatically but does NOT update version comments — use `python scripts/workflow_versions.py update-comments` to sync them.

## Repository Guard Pattern (ADR 011)

Every optional workflow has an `if:` guard at the top of each job:

```yaml
if: >-
  github.repository == 'OWNER/REPO'
  || vars.ENABLE_WORKFLOWS == 'true'
  || vars.ENABLE_<WORKFLOW> == 'true'
```

- When adding a new workflow, include this guard unless the workflow is essential (test, lint, type-check, ci-gate).
- When `YOURNAME/YOURREPO` appears, it's a placeholder for the real repo slug.

## CI Gate (ADR 024)

- `ci-gate.yml` is the single required check for branch protection.
- It watches for completion of all required workflow jobs listed in `REQUIRED_CHECKS`.
- **If you rename a workflow job's `name:` field**, update `REQUIRED_CHECKS` in `ci-gate.yml` — otherwise the gate silently stops finding it and times out.

## Conventions

- Separate workflows by concern (one workflow per purpose).
- Use descriptive job `name:` fields — these appear in GitHub's status checks UI.
- Path-filtered workflows (bandit, docs-deploy, link-checker, license-check) are excluded from required checks because they don't run on every PR.
- Schedule-only and warn-only workflows are also excluded from the CI gate.
- `docs-build` runs on all PRs and IS in the CI gate.

## Workflow Categories

| Category      | Examples                                                  |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| Quality       | test, lint-format, type-check, coverage, spellcheck       |
| Security      | bandit, pip-audit, CodeQL, dependency-review, Trivy/Grype |
| PR Hygiene    | commit-lint, pr-title, labeler                            |
| Documentation | docs-build, docs-deploy                                   |
| Release       | release-please, release, sbom                             |
| Container     | container-build, container-scan                           |
| Maintenance   | pre-commit-update, stale, link-checker, cache-cleanup     |
| Gate          | ci-gate (single required check)                           |

Full inventory: `docs/workflows.md` (authoritative).
